goals.title: PER-5 / P0-T03: Freeze release terminology in docs/release/release-ve...
goals.objective: PER-5 / P0-T03: Freeze release terminology in docs/release/release-verification-matrix.md. Define production-ready, E2E-tested, split-machine, voice proof, and overlay relay so local smoke, Tauri WebDriver, split-machine, and public-provider proof cannot be confused. Add/adjust a grep gate for forbidden overclaim phrases, verify with docs/gate commands, open PR, and hand off to QA. Scope is docs and release gate only unless existing code requires otherwise.
goals.evidence: Completed G001-per-5-p0-t03-freeze-release-terminol in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json: defined frozen release evidence terms, added overclaim assertions to release matrix gate, verified release matrix and explicit rg forbidden-overclaim scan, and documented that native independent review agents were unavailable before PR/QA review.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json for PER-5 / P0-T03; update release definitions and overclaim gate only within assigned docs/gate scope; verify with the release matrix gate and grep evidence; open/update PR and hand off to QA.
